Fig. 3. Real-robot evaluation tasks on the Toyota HSR: (a) approaching a ceramic mug, (b) grasping a Cheez-It cracker box. Each model is run for 20 trials across the two objects.
Fig. 1. End-to-end pipeline: pretraining SmolVLA on HSR teleoperation data, task-specific fine-tuning on a pick-up task (producing HSR-SmolVLA), and offline + real-robot evaluation.
